# Content Catalog Snapshot

## Agent Configuration

| Field               | Value                                           |
|---------------------|-------------------------------------------------|
| Intent              | Look for outdated but real content, search the web if needed                            |
| Search Scope        | All .mdx files                      |
| Processing Priority | Created date first then lastUpdated               |
| Issue Preferences   | Don't care right now                 |
| PR Preferences      | don't care right now                    |
| Label               | `clearly-outdated`                      |
| Created             | 2026-03-05                    |
